'''Gotida''' was a celestial body located in the [[Goti system]]<ref name="AIR" /> within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of the [[City/Legends|settlement]] known as [[Jalor City]] as well as its suburbs.<ref name="AIR" />

Gotida was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Riic Mardec]], who worked as a [[Taxi speeder|repulsortaxi]] driver since his teenage years and spent nearly fourteen [[Standard year/Legends|years]] saving [[Currency/Legends|money]] to move his family out of Jalor City.<ref name="AIR" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> however, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] carried out an attack on a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell in the city that resulted in Mardec's family being [[Death/Legends|killed]] in cross-fire.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gotida was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Goti [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square O-10.<ref name="TEA" />
